summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Iteration 4 features: Government logos in Header/Footer and new Rutas (Travel Routes) page. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all sections
Government logo (escudo) visible in Header next to 'Veracruz Contigo' text
'Rutas' navigation link visible in Header navigation bar
'Rutas' quick link button (purple) visible on homepage
Government institutional strip in Footer with escudo logo + 'Gobierno del Estado de Veracruz' text
Brand logo visible in Footer institutional strip
Footer contains 'Rutas de Viaje' link under Explorar section
/rutas page loads with 'Rutas de Viaje' title
4 route cards displayed: Escapada Express (3 días), Ruta de Pueblos Mágicos (5 días), Aventura Veracruzana Completa (7 días), Ruta Cultural y Arqueológica (4 días)
Each route card shows duration, difficulty, description, tags, and municipio count
Clicking route card shows detail view with hero, route overview, and day-by-day itinerary
Route detail view shows 'Volver a rutas' button that returns to route list
Escapada Express (3 días) shows 3 days with activities, tips, and 'Ver municipio' links
Aventura Veracruzana Completa (7 días) shows all 7 days with activities, tips, and 'Ver municipio' links
'Ver municipio' link navigates correctly to municipality page (tested with Xalapa)

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend changes in this iteration)

test_credentials: No auth needed for these features - all public pages
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - Rutas page uses static frontend data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features fully tested and working. Government logos (escudo) properly displayed in Header and Footer. New Rutas page with 4 travel routes (3-day, 4-day, 5-day, 7-day) working correctly with detail views, day-by-day itineraries, tips, and 'Ver municipio' links. All navigation flows verified. No backend changes were made in this iteration - the Rutas page uses static frontend data.
